articles.title: Just one Mass. college ranks among the nation’s best graduate schools, per U.S. News
articles.description:
MIT leads in engineering, but Massachusetts medical and nursing programs mostly fall short in the 2026 rankings.

The post Just one Mass. college ranks among the nation’s best graduate schools, per U.S. News appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MIT ranks as the top engineering school in the nation for 2026.
Massachusetts medical and nursing programs fall short in national rankings.
Local students may face limited options for top-tier graduate programs.

articles.title: Suffolk DA Kevin Hayden appears to have a new primary challenger. She used to work in his office.
articles.description:
Linda Champion previously ran for Suffolk district attorney in 2018 and appears to be gearing up for another campaign.

The post Suffolk DA Kevin Hayden appears to have a new primary challenger. She used to work in his office. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Linda Champion, former Suffolk DA candidate, is challenging Kevin Hayden in the upcoming primary.
Champion previously worked in Hayden's office and ran for DA in 2018.
Boston residents may see a shift in leadership and policy direction with this challenge.

articles.title: Malden cook goes viral for selling trendy Ilocos empanadas out of her apartment
articles.description:
Janz Van's Ilocos empanadas went viral online, but after Malden's Board of Health shut it down, she's looking for a permanent spot to sell her popular Filipino street food.

The post Malden cook goes viral for selling trendy Ilocos empanadas out of her apartment appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Janz Van's Ilocos empanadas gained popularity online, attracting local attention.
Malden's Board of Health shut down her apartment operation due to regulations.
Van is now seeking a permanent location to continue selling her empanadas.
